badge_ready_body:
Hello {first_name},

Your official ACCRA 2026 accreditation badge has been generated.

You can download and print your PDF badge here:
{download_link}

Please bring this with you to the venue.
badge_ready_bulk_body:
Hello {first_name},

Your official ACCRA 2026 accreditation badge has been generated in bulk by your organization.

You can download your PDF badge here:
{download_link}

Please bring this with you to the venue.
app_received_body:
Hello {first_name},

Your accreditation application for the ACCRA 2026 tournament has been successfully received and is currently under review.

You will receive another email once a decision has been made.
app_received_bulk_body:
Hello {first_name},

An accreditation application for the ACCRA 2026 tournament has been submitted on your behalf by your organization.

You will receive another email once a decision has been made.
app_approved_body: Congratulations {first_name}, your application for category {category} has been approved and you are now an official Participant!
app_returned_body:
Dear {first_name},

Your accreditation application (Ref: {application_id}) has been returned and requires action before it can proceed to final review.

Reason for Return:
{return_reason}

Next Steps:
Please revisit the form at {update_link} and resubmit your application.

Please note that delays in resubmission may affect your application timeline.
app_rejected_body:
Dear {first_name},

Unfortunately, your accreditation application has been rejected.

Reason:
{rejection_reason}
doc_rejected_subject: Action Required: Update your ACCRA 2026 Document ({document_type})
doc_rejected_body:
Hello {first_name},

There is an issue with the '{document_type}' document you uploaded for your accreditation application.

Reason: {rejection_reason}

Please log in to the portal to re-upload a valid document so your application can proceed.
forgot_password_body:
Click the following link to reset your password. It expires in 1 hour:

{reset_link}
test_email_body:
Hello {first_name},

This is a test of the new ACCRA 2026 HTML email design in English.
If you are seeing this, the i18n system is working perfectly!

Click here to test the dynamic button extraction:
{test_link}
email_copy_paste_hint: Or copy and paste the link above into your browser.
email_security_notice_body: Please do not share this link with anyone. It provides secure access to your ACCRA 2026 account.
email_ignore_if_not_you: If you received this email but did not register for an accreditation account, please ignore this email.
email_contact_support_intro: If you need assistance, please contact our support team at
email_footer_notice: If you are not the intended recipient, please ignore this mail or contact us on
